song.title: Thy Mighty Love
song.author: E. May Grimes
song.lyrics:
;Amaj7: 006650 Bm7add11: 004430 [V1] .Amaj7 Bm7add11 Amaj7 Bm7add11 Thy mighty love, O God, constraineth me, .Amaj7 Bm7add11 Amaj7 Bm7add11 As some strong tide it presseth on its way, .D E A A7 Seeking a channel in my self-bound soul, .D E A Bm7add11 Yearning to sweep all barriers away.
[V2] Shall I not yield to that constraining power? Shall I not say, O tide of love, flow in? My God, Thy gentleness hath conquered me, Life cannot be as it hath hither been.
[V3] Break through my nature, mighty, heavenly love, Clear every avenue of thought and brain, Flood my affections, purify my will, Let nothing but Thine own pure life remain.
[V4] Thus wholly mastered and possessed by God, Forth from my life, spontaneous and free, Shall flow a stream of tenderness and grace, Loving, because God loved, eternally.
[B] .Amaj7 Bm7add11 Amaj7 Bm7add11 Amaj7 Thy mighty love, O God, constraineth me.
